source.ref: flexi - mom, why the sky looks different today

display.name: Flexi - mom, why the sky looks different today
display.author: Flexi
display.blurb: An alien sky shifts overhead — clouds remembering they could move.

annotation.technical_notes: A pair of custom shapes are rendered symmetrically along a diagonal axis, scaling dynamically with the music's bass. High zoom and a moderate decay rate in the per-pixel warp shader create a cascading, feather-like feedback trail through sampler_main. The muted, near-monochromatic palette emphasizes the fluid, organic geometry of the repeating domain.
